name: NexCampus v2.3.3
changelog: Code runner fix — no longer crashes the app (sys.executable bug on PyInstaller)
HiDPI Solar System — crisp rendering, hover glow, orbit trails
In-app self-update with real-time progress polling
Desktop shortcut now created on both Linux and Windows
Better code runner error messages for missing interpreters
Canvas aspect-ratio fix prevents stretching distortion
Solar System overhaul: zoom/pan, Milky Way, asteroid belt, Saturn rings, pulsing Sun, dwarf planets, tabbed info, 34 facts
Code Lab: 10 Python guides, code runner, 85-term dictionary, 11 projects
Startup crash fixes, stale process cleanup
